title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map grew new paths
gist.blurb: The API map has been regenerated from the latest production OpenAPI spec. Less archaeological digging, more building strange little things.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the current production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference reflects the latest deployed endpoints and schema details.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API reference get documentation aligned with the production API, making integrations easier to build and verify.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy documentation garden: Polly, wearing tiny librarian glasses, updates a large open API field guide beside a retro terminal. Fresh code-vines and small flowers grow from the pages, representing the production OpenAPI spec becoming a clearer reference.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully stamping an open API field guide beside a retro CRT terminal glowing lime green (#ecf874); code-vines, tiny flowers, and labeled document pages sprout from the book. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with subtle pixel-font text: 'API DOCS'.
